extracted.title: Bobcat Storage Conditions for 02/04/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Bobcat Gas Storage (Bobcat) system for Gas Day February 4, 2026:

Bobcat has restricted excess withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Bobcat has scheduled and sealed withdrawals/delivery nominations and IWS activity to meter 45401 - TEXAS EASTERN - STORAGE (R-INJ 40401/D-WTD 40402). No increases in withdrawals/deliveries or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45401 - TEXAS EASTERN - STORAGE (R-INJ 40401/D-WTD 40402) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
